special_mechanics.name: Close Combat
special_mechanics.description: When soldiers get close enough, melee combat ensues with punch, kick, or block mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Weapon-Based Movement Variation
special_mechanics.description: Different unit classes have varying effective ranges and movement patterns based on weapon type (submachine gun, rocket launcher, grenades, flamethrower, dynamite)

special_mechanics.name: Water Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Scorcher unit's flamethrower weapon is temporarily disabled in water

tier_notes: Tier 3 qualitative data only. General Chaos is a real-time tactics/strategy game with squad control mechanics rather than traditional platformer physics. Movement parameters are not documented in available sources as the game emphasizes strategic unit positioning and weapon mechanics over precise movement physics. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview but no quantitative movement data.
